name: EPG SportsDB Enricher
description: Enriches EPG sport programmes with artwork and event details from TheSportsDB. Uses smart multi-sport fetching on the free tier (30 req/min) and full TV schedule matching with a premium API key.

settings.label: TheSportsDB API key (optional)
settings.helper_text: Your TheSportsDB premium API key for full TV schedule matching (500 events/day). Leave empty to use the free tier (5 events per sport per day, 30 req/min).

settings.label: Country filter (premium only)
settings.helper_text: Filter TV schedule by country (e.g. 'Germany', 'United Kingdom'). Only used with a premium API key.

settings.label: Countries to fetch leagues for (free tier)
settings.helper_text: Select which countries' top leagues to fetch from TheSportsDB on the free tier. Each country adds a few extra API requests per day. Not used when a premium API key is set.

settings.label: Custom leagues (free tier)
settings.helper_text: Additional TheSportsDB league names to query (e.g. 'Italian_Serie_B', 'MLS'). Find the name in the league's URL on thesportsdb.com. Not used when a premium API key is set.

settings.label: Add event artwork
settings.helper_text: Add event poster/thumbnail images to sport programmes.

settings.label: Add event descriptions
settings.helper_text: Add sport, league, season and venue info as programme description.

settings.label: Overwrite existing data
settings.helper_text: Replace existing artwork and descriptions. When disabled, only programmes with missing data are enriched.

settings.label: Match confidence threshold
settings.helper_text: Minimum match score (0–115) required to accept a SportsDB event as a match. Lower values match more loosely. 35 is recommended for team sports; individual sports (Golf, F1, Tennis) automatically use 20.

settings.label: Match programmes without Sports category
settings.helper_text: Also try to enrich programmes that are not categorised as Sports, but whose title contains a known sports keyword (e.g. Bundesliga, Champions League, Golf, F1).

settings.label: Auto-run after EPG cache generation
settings.helper_text: Automatically enrich sport programmes whenever the EPG cache is rebuilt.

settings.label: Restrict auto-run to playlists
settings.helper_text: Only auto-run for these playlists. Leave empty to process all playlists linked to the EPG.

actions.label: Enrich Sport Programmes
actions.description: Enrich sport programmes with TheSportsDB event data.

fields.label: Playlist
fields.helper_text: Select the playlist whose sport programmes should be enriched.

actions.label: Health Check
actions.description: Show plugin status and SportsDB API connectivity.

actions.label: Clear State
actions.description: Reset enrichment tracking. Next run will re-process all files.
